info.name: Demo AntiAI Subscription Service
info.description: Sequential API collection ordered specifically for a step-by-step product demonstration (from setup to billing and analytics).

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Pro Max Demo",
  "slug": "pro-max-demo",
  "price": 599000,
  "billing_cycle": "monthly",
  "description": "Paket Pro Max untuk keperluan demo sistem",
  "features": {
    "model_access": [
      "gpt-4",
      "gpt-4o",
      "gpt-3.5-turbo"
    ],
    "message_cap": null,
    "response_speed": "fastest",
    "plugins": true,
    "custom_gpts": true,
    "api_access": true
  },
  "trial_days": 7
}

{
  "name": "Pro Max Demo Updated",
  "price": 699000,
  "billing_cycle": "monthly",
  "description": "Paket Pro Max Terupdate",
  "features": {
    "model_access": [
      "gpt-4",
      "gpt-4o"
    ],
    "message_cap": 1000,
    "response_speed": "fastest",
    "plugins": true,
    "custom_gpts": true,
    "api_access": true
  },
  "trial_days": 5,
  "is_active": true
}

exec: console.log("Subscription & Invoice ID saved to environment!");
